{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20860_1
|class_id=20860
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20860_2
|fame=18
|art=9
|fth=18
|civ=16
|tech=29
|ss1=Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +5<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss2=Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +10<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss3=Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +15<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss4=Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +15<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss7=Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +15<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000<br> (Awakened)
}}
